name: Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG)
description: Zimbabwe introduced the gold-backed ZiG currency in 2024 after years of hyperinflation destroyed previous currencies. The US dollar remains widely used.
historicalNotes: Zimbabwe experienced the world's second-worst hyperinflation in 2008, with prices doubling every 24 hours. After abandoning the Zimbabwe dollar and using foreign currencies, the ZiG was introduced in 2024.
